content: Alice is never getting off my team myan
Blessing of agora is too op
I just came back after a short break and did 20 pulls, that's all
There was apparently a new year alice too?
Idk if i should go for her too
If only I had enough gems
Got normal Berk on Ainikki banner
and my funds are so dry after going all in on yuzu
Now just hoping I get her from the free bones

content: On a post about a new gacha
That is the worst pose ive ever seen
So they're just going to uninstall ChatGPT
Not even chatgpt could make such a pose
Like is it supposed to be sexy?
It just looks like she came out of a shitty eroge
The elf girl is literally missing her thumb
It just blends with her index
How do you feel about voices?
No, the ones that can invade your head
Haven't had a bad one yet
I just talk to myself sometimes
Might be a sign of something
Well, and previous ~~victim~~ player who had them unfortunately passed them back to me so I want to know if you would like to experience Them
You seem like a ~~new person~~ well rounded person
Why are there more voices in my head
Its 2 less voices that I have to deal work
I'm finally able to be financially stable again
The new voices are part of my voice society
The voice in my head calls me their little honeypie
The voice in the head? You mean
today is the day we have a feast
officially marks the end of lunar new year
when we celebrate this, it is 100% lunar new year end
thats where all my money goes
in exchange being poor in gacha games
I shouldn't look at this when I'm fasting <:dead:1356082627509092372>
Food in Viet seems so good
lmao thats guilty gear right? they've done the pose first dang
Snorlax and Bokrug Bishop Reya|伯克鲁格尋求者 were playing
looks really good, but I think i would starve at that table
u dont eat pork that much?
I do, but it looks tasteless
the crispy pork skin is good

pork, good enough
chicken, quite tasteless
||you dont know how to cook rice||
The yasuo was really good tbh
When i was defending and ganking
I ganked bot and it gave me gold
And then i spawn killed lilia
I have all of nunu skin
is there a new one or you mean the one she came out with?
Currently yunara isn't in the game
But maybe when she come you'll download it?
<@523084324724146193> i just checked the aatrox match history
All score in negative while playing mage or dps champ
It's not like sion where you abuse his passive for gold diff
Not enough big forehead awakeners released. Kade has nothing to do
rain spends 2hr to stare at Yunara's abs
can't be caught playing on a properly coded client
<@332573289438380032> you’re amazing thanks for the codes
my home smells like fart because beans are being cooked
I KNOW THIS MEME, I DIDNT KNOW IT WAS FROM THIS VIDEO

Hello mates! Good evening everyone. I just started the game, one hour ago. I did choose Jenkis as first free ssr, and the game offers me for 5 bucks another ssr. Is this a good offer? In case, what shall I choose? Ty for your help

Another question... I found the code for 100 pulls. Should I save them for the future or just use them?

Sorry for the many questions

For the newbies out there, don't forget to redeem codes for freebies ( The timer show when they'll expires ):

- HVGX-HLDX-QKKN **`never`**
- QKBQ-SSDG-JZYU  **`never`**
- Catsgift  **`never`**
- Dc5000  **`never`**
- Silverkey  **`never`**
- MistSequence  <t:1777305599:R>
- YouSavedMorimens  <t:1773054000:R>
- XVAV-HBKW-SLHK  <t:1772146740:R>
- ZVFT-FMZJ-DTLS  <t:1772294340:R>
- EQUB-ATGJ-PJUV  <t:1772294340:R>
- HKAJ-UQAG-BFTV  <t:1772294340:R>
- DXCN-YDEA-JCKA  <t:1772294340:R>

Currently only actives codes.
You can get them in <#1355094251775459399> or <#1355085076500578363>
Those pulls are not usable on new banners?
no the game differentiates between standard and limited pulls
standard ones are the grey ones
Ok! Thanks. So i'll just pull on standard banner that grey pulls
also dont use silver on standard banner pulls
premium currency is reserved for limiteds
Was Jenkis a good choice? I read some guides, but still know nothing about Morimens
most of the standard characters will end up as supports for different units
feel free to ask in <#1433513650299076780> or <#1400749543288475770> whenever something comes up
I'll do! Have a great day/evening
